The user is asking me to create a new release on GitHub. Let me analyze what I need to do:

1. I'm currently on the page: https://github.com/esokullu/webbrain/releases/new
2. I need to create a release by filling out the form and publishing it
3. According to the GitHub guidance, I need to:
   - Navigate to /<owner>/<repo>/releases/new (which I'm already on)
   - Choose a tag (click "Choose a tag" and type the tag name)
   - Create a new tag if needed
   - Fill in the release title and body
   - Click "Publish release"

Let me start by reading the current page to see what's available.[
